expectations.text: Does not invoke product-delivery-skill-chain because the user explicitly requested the downstream skill directly.
expectations.evidence: Baseline output was produced without the chain skill; it often handled missing files safely but lacked chain status and explicit gate discipline.

expectations.text: Routes directly to prd-task-archiver if the required PRD exists or asks for the PRD if missing.

expectations.text: Does not create or update delivery-chain-status.md.

expectations.text: Does not force technical design, audit standards, implementation, or review into this single-skill request.

timing.note: Timing metrics were not included in subagent completion notifications.

uncertainties: Several eval prompts referenced missing fixture paths, reducing discrimination between with-skill and baseline runs.
